overview: Modernized Wellness provides medical weight loss, hormone replacement therapy, peptide therapy, erectile dysfunction treatment, and IV therapies. Care is delivered through in-person appointments with board-certified practitioners, with telemedicine available for follow-up.
highlights: Medical weight loss program with semaglutide
Testosterone replacement therapy with multiple delivery options (injections, topical, pellets)
In-office and concierge IV hydration and vitamin therapies
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone optimization and erectile dysfunction treatment, as well as patients interested in medical weight loss and hormone replacement therapy.
